pairs.question: Who was Archibald Anthony Rigg and what sports did he play professionally?
pairs.answer: Archibald Anthony Rigg (18 April 1865 – 2 September 1918) was a New Zealand cricketer who also played rugby union professionally. He was a member of the Pōneke cricket and football clubs, later joining the Midland Cricket Club. As a cricketer, he was noted for being a fast bowler and a dashing batsman.

pairs.question: What was Archibald Rigg's only first-class cricket match and what were his performance details?
pairs.answer: Rigg's only first-class cricket match was against Auckland at the Basin Reserve in January 1885. He scored a single run in the only innings he batted and did not take any wickets during the match.

pairs.question: What were the major roles and career milestones of Archibald Rigg outside of sports?
pairs.answer: Rigg worked for John Duthie and Co, an ironmongers firm in Wellington, for over 33 years. He began as an employee, travelled throughout the West Coast Region and North Island, and was eventually promoted to the role of manager at the company's Wellington store.

pairs.question: How did Archibald Rigg's health issues affect his later years?
pairs.answer: Rigg suffered from lung problems for several years before collapsing in June 1918. He was bed-ridden until his death in September of the same year, at the age of 53.

pairs.question: What personal details are known about Archibald Rigg's family life?
pairs.answer: Rigg was married and had three children. He was 53 years old when he died on 2 September 1918.

pairs.question: Where was Archibald Rigg born and educated?
pairs.answer: Rigg was born in Wellington, New Zealand, in 1865. He attended Mount Cook High School in Wellington, where he played cricket.

pairs.question: Write a Python script to calculate Archibald Rigg's age at death based on his birth and death years.
pairs.answer:
python
def calculate_age_at_death(birth_year, death_year):
    return death_year - birth_year

birth_year = 1865
death_year = 1918
age_at_death = calculate_age_at_death(birth_year, death_year)
print(f"Archibald Rigg was {age_at_death} years old at the time of his death.")

This script calculates Rigg's age at death by subtracting his birth year (1865) from his death year (1918), yielding 53 years.
